steps.title: Relate general claim to detail
steps.content: The first sentence says Bradford improved Edison's light bulb design. The next sentence gives the precise improvement: he made the bulb more durable by placing cardboard around its carbon filament.

steps.title: Reject unrelated transitions
steps.content: Choice A emphasizes time, but the second sentence explains the improvement. Choice B signals dismissal. Choice C signals contrast, but the second sentence supports and narrows the first.

steps.title: Choose the specific detail cue
steps.content: Specifically correctly introduces the particular way Bradford improved the light bulb design. The answer is D.
